description_long: This book object is a rectangular, blocky item with a simple, stylized appearance, fitting the voxel art style of the room. It is seen on a shelf, with a solid color cover and no visible text or illustrations on the front. The book's cover is a single, bold color, and the spine is not detailed with any markings or patterns. The edges are sharp and the proportions are consistent with a standard hardcover book. The book is part of a group of similar books, each with a different color, arranged neatly on a shelf. The overall look is clean and minimalistic, with no visible wear or decorative elements.
description: A blocky, solid-colored book with a plain cover and no visible text or illustration, styled in a minimal voxel art fashion.
description_view_0: The book is not visible from this view, as only the exterior black wall of the room is shown.
description_view_1: Several books are visible on the shelf, each with a solid color cover and no visible text or illustration; the book in question is among them.
description_view_2: The books are seen from a different angle, still showing their plain, solid-colored covers and blocky shapes on the shelf.
description_view_3: The book is not visible from this view, as only the exterior black wall of the room is shown.
